summary: A comprehensive forensic audit of the Wincham Group covering: (1) every named individual associate with their position, role, and required accreditations they should have held; (2) every confirmed Wincham company, subsidiary, and shell entity (UK and Spanish); (3) full UK and Spanish offices/registered addresses; (4) whether a Lanzarote office ever existed (confirmed: NO); (5) required group-level licences Wincham should have held across all jurisdictions. Sourced from Companies House records, BORME (Spanish commercial registry), ICAEW, FCA, HMRC registers, Wincham's own web presence, and the existing forensic Nine-Task Verification Report.
